about.name: TRIPP
about.tagline: builder of things // breaker of things
about.bio: Developer and creative based somewhere with good Wi-Fi. I read books, play games, and ship things to the internet.

books.title: The Name of the Wind
books.author: Patrick Rothfuss
books.notes: Kvothe is insufferable in the best possible way.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.notes: The spice must flow. Nothing else needs to be said.

books.title: Project Hail Mary
books.author: Andy Weir
books.notes: Rocky was the best character in any book I've read in years.

books.title: Snow Crash
books.author: Neal Stephenson
books.notes: Ahead of its time, but drags in the second half.

books.title: The Martian
books.author: Andy Weir
books.notes: I will figure this out. Pure problem-solving dopamine.

books.title: Neuromancer
books.author: William Gibson
books.notes: Dense but worth every page. The original.

games.title: Elden Ring
games.notes: Finally made it to Farum Azula

projects.name: SeaWeed League
projects.description: A fake collegiate sports league. Two universities built so far — Shrimple (Drexel parody) and LIT (MIT parody). Full dashboards, auth, and campus pages.

projects.name: Personal Dashboard
projects.description: This site. A solarpunk cyberpunk dashboard tracking what I'm reading, playing, and building. Hand-edited JSON, zero dependencies.
